arts.ttl: Predicted XI v West Ham as sub's display may force Ruud van Nistelrooy change
arts.sum: Facundo Buonanotte will be hoping he has forced himself into the Leicester City starting line-up at West Ham as Ruud van Nistelrooy looks for a boost to the club's survival hopes. “It’s always the right time to try something different that you think can help us get the results we want,” van Nistelrooy said at his press conference on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy confirms Leicester quit stance as two coaches SACKED
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy insists he plans to remain with Leicester regardless of whether or not they're relegated from the Premier League with his contract committing him to the club for two more years

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy makes contract vow amid Leicester City relegation fears
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is committed to his Leicester City contract and suggested he would remain in charge should the club be relegated to the Championship. In an emotional post-match press conference following Friday’s 4-0 thrashing by Brentford, van Nistelrooy said “with the squad we have, it's a huge mountain to climb to stay in this league”.
